path.description: Path relative to the mod folder, pointing to the executable/script to run

args.description: List of arguments to pass to the command. Tokens in the format of {{TOKEN}} get replaced with values from the game: {{ExecutableName}}, {{GameJson}}, {{ExecutablePath}}, {{StartCommand}}, {{StartCommandArgs}}, {{RunnablePath}}

wineEnvironment.description: Environment variables to set when running the command via Wine. Tokens in the format of {{TOKEN}} get replaced with values from the game: {{ExecutableName}}, {{GameJson}}, {{ExecutablePath}}, {{StartCommand}}, {{StartCommandArgs}}, {{RunnablePath}}
